001package edu.cnm.deepdive.pippiphooray.controller;
002
003import android.app.DatePickerDialog;
004import android.app.Dialog;
005import android.os.Bundle;
006import android.widget.DatePicker;
007import androidx.annotation.NonNull;
008import androidx.fragment.app.DialogFragment;
009import java.util.Calendar;
010
011public class DatePickerFragment extends DialogFragment
012    implements DatePickerDialog.OnDateSetListener {
013
014  @NonNull
015  @Override
016  public Dialog onCreateDialog(Bundle savedInstanceState) {
017    // Use the current date as the default date in the picker.
018    final Calendar c = Calendar.getInstance();
019    int year = c.get(Calendar.YEAR);
020    int month = c.get(Calendar.MONTH);
021    int day = c.get(Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH);
022
023    // Create a new instance of DatePickerDialog and return it.
024    return new DatePickerDialog(requireContext(), this, year, month, day);
025  }
026
027  public void onDateSet(DatePicker view, int year, int month, int day) {
028    // Do something with the date the user picks.
029  }
030}
